scripts.build: bun run --filter '@rhi-zone/fractal-core' build && bun run --filter '@rhi-zone/fractal-transport' build && bun run --filter '@rhi-zone/fractal-codec-json' --filter '@rhi-zone/fractal-codec-structured-clone' --filter '@rhi-zone/fractal-protocol-correlation' build && bun run --filter '@rhi-zone/fractal-channel-http' --filter '@rhi-zone/fractal-channel-websocket' --filter '@rhi-zone/fractal-channel-worker' --filter '@rhi-zone/fractal-channel-stdio' build && bun run --filter '@rhi-zone/fractal-preset-websocket' build && bun run --filter '@rhi-zone/fractal-standard-schema' --filter '@rhi-zone/fractal-example-todo-api' build
